Short CV

She was born in 1984 in Istanbul. In 2003, Marmara University Faculty of Economics and Administrative Sciences began a degree in Economics. After graduation from Marmara University Institute of Social Sciences Department of Business Administration, Production Management and Marketing Department of the graduate education began in 2007.

Assoc. Dr. Şakir Erdem carried out by the consultant "Evaluation of the Quality Factor of Country of Origin and White Goods Sector Detected An Application" has graduated with a master's thesis in 2010. Still, since 2011 Sakarya University, Institute of Business Administration, Department of Social Sciences, Production Management and Marketing Science doctoral training continues to the start of Medicine. "Marketing, Selected Writings on Management and Training Prof. Dr. Selima Sezgin Memorial Book "are written in one book chapter. In addition, the 1st International New Media and Women Symposium "Women segmented by consumers of the Gender Role Perception and the Ideal Image of Women" presented in the research report says. 2015 4th International Symposium on Gender Vocational Schools presented a paper entitled The Role of Gender on Hedonic Shopping. In 2015 Multidisciplinary International Eurasian Congress of Gender shopping motivations presented a paper entitled The Role of Gender on Shopping Motivations.

In 2014 Üsküdar University Health Services Vocational School has been a lecturer in Medical Advertising and Marketing.
